Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign severity
        Call case
          Binary ==
            Ident level
            String "ERROR"
          String "critical"
          Binary ==
            Ident level
            String "WARN"
          String "warning"
          String "normal"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident severity
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident severity
